title: QR Codes in Monday.com
excerpt: What is the best app to use for creating QR codes in Monday.com to trigger automations

posts.author: jerry.pyle (Jerry Pyle)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the best app to use for creating QR codes in Monday.com to trigger automations

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jerry.pyle,

Our app is a strong solution to it. It’s called QR Flow – Item Tracking & More and it lets you create dynamic QR codes that can trigger automations or collect user input into your monday board.

image2073×1394 228 KB

image2090×1482 269 KB

It supports custom automation builder, so you can trigger any automation when a QR code is scanned:

image1676×942 50.4 KB

Additionally, you get full control over when QR codes should be enabled, and there is no constraint on the number of QR codes generated.

We are happy to answer any questions and help with your use case!

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jerry.pyle - This quick QR code comparison should help you figure out which one works best for you: Top QR Code Trackers for monday.com

If you’re looking for something secure, customizable, and built for real automation, QR Item Tracker is your all-in-one QR code app for monday.com.

Here’s why it stands out:

  • Most features: The only QR app with 26+ automations (and counting) including full subitem-level support.

  • True update on scan: Many apps just generate QR codes; QR Item Tracker lets you update your board instantly after scanning.

  • Best value: More features, yet still more affordable than other QR code tools that charge just for generation.

  • Designed for real workflows: Perfect for teams that want to not only locate items faster but also manage and update them directly inside monday.com.

We also offer a free live walkthrough if you’d like help getting started.

Cheers,
Avo

posts.author: jerry.pyle (Jerry Pyle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am needing an app that I can create a qr code to add to a PDF so I can print off the PDF to use as a shop traveler.

The shop will then scan the QR code to start and/or stop time tracker for the task they are working on. They also need to scan a QR code to complete the task they are working on.

posts.author: jerry.pyle (Jerry Pyle)
posts.cookedHtml: My initial trial period ended. Is it possible to get an extend trial period?

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jerry.pyle - we’ve replied to your inquiry via email, please check your inbox for our response.

jerry.pyle:

I am needing an app that I can create a qr code to add to a PDF so I can print off the PDF to use as a shop traveler.

The shop will then scan the QR code to start and/or stop time tracker for the task they are working on. They also need to scan a QR code to complete the task they are working on.

Our QR Item Tracker app can easily generate a QR code, save it as a PDF for printing, and update your monday.com board in real time when scanned. We’d be happy to help you set it up at your convenience.

The QR Item Tracker app includes a free plan that doesn’t expire.

If you’re referring to your monday.com trial, you’ll need to contact their support team directly.

Cheers,
Avo

posts.author: DocCreate (FlowTech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jerry.pyle ,

Checkout the newest app we released this month in the marketplace: QR Trax.

QR Trax helps operational and field teams capture structured data, verify site activity, and automatically update boards the moment a QR code is scanned.

Key Features

Create Branded QR Codes at Scale
Generate unlimited custom QR codes tied to items, assets, locations, or workflows.

Custom eForms Linked to Each QR Code
Attach fully customized scan forms to capture structured inputs such as status updates, notes, dropdown selections, photos, and files — all mapped directly to monday columns and subitems.

GPS & Address Capture for Verified Scans
Every scan records geo location, timestamp, and street address to create reliable audit trails for inspections, field visits, compliance tracking, and asset verification.

Automatic Board Updates & Subitem Creation
Scanning a code can instantly create records, update item status, log activity history, and trigger automations.

Photo & File Upload from the Field
Capture visual proof and documentation during scans using any mobile device.

Real-Time Scan Tracking & History
Search, audit, and export scan data to maintain operational transparency and reporting accuracy.

Mobile-Friendly Field Workflows
Designed for teams working across sites, facilities, and distributed locations.

Common Use Cases

Teams are using QR Trax for:

  • Asset and equipment tracking

  • Property and facility inspections

  • Field service visit verification

  • Maintenance workflows and work orders

  • Construction site activity logs

  • Inventory tracking

  • Event and visitor check-ins

QR Trax is built for operational environments including property management, construction, logistics, facilities, and field services.

If you’re looking to connect real-world activity directly to your monday boards, QR Trax can help streamline your workflows.

We’d love feedback from the community and are happy to support new implementations.

— FlowTech Team
